title: Enable PDF download with formatting matching uploaded research paper template

requirements.text: Replace the current text file download in DownloadButton.tsx with PDF generation functionality that exports the research paper as a PDF document

quotes: I want to download the document as pdf

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the download button generates and downloads a PDF file instead of a .txt file
The PDF file has a .pdf extension and appropriate MIME type
PDF generation handles all research paper sections without data loss

requirements.text: Format the PDF document to match the structure and styling of the uploaded research paper template, preserving the document hierarchy, section formatting, typography conventions, and layout patterns from the reference template

quotes: the document downloaded should be similar to the uploaded research paper

acceptanceCriteria: PDF document structure matches the uploaded research paper template format
Section headings, numbering, and hierarchy follow the template conventions
Typography (fonts, sizes, spacing) matches the reference template styling
Page layout and margins are consistent with the template

requirements.text: Update the downloadHelper.ts utility to support PDF generation while maintaining the existing formatPaper function's template-based formatting logic
acceptanceCriteria: The formatPaper function's template formatting is preserved and applied to PDF output
All 12 research paper sections are correctly rendered in the PDF

constraints: Do not change the backend ResearchPaper type or main.mo actor methods
Preserve the existing formatPaper template-based formatting logic from downloadHelper.ts
Maintain compatibility with the current DownloadButton.tsx component interface
nonGoals: Changing the research paper data structure or backend storage
Modifying the authentication system or user interface beyond the download button
Adding new research paper sections or fields
